name: zynrest
description: ZYNREST - Premium Zynrest-style image gallery with search and download

scripts.build: echo 'No build step required for static app'
scripts.cap:build:android: npm run cap:copy && npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:build:ios: npm run cap:copy && npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:build:electron: npm run cap:copy && npm run cap:sync && npx cap open @capacitor-community/electron

author: ZYNREST Team
